codex_consult.feedback_summary: Skill(codex) blocked by pretool-tool-policy.py hook: tool Skill not in allowed_tools for role style-inspector. Self-review substituted.
codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: self-review substituted — 5 adversarial questions answered: (1) Standard 3 ba.md:1267 correct — venv activated before python3; (2) Standard 2 report-schema.json $id URI correct — JSON Schema identity convention, not operational URL; (3) Standard 8 large JSON output blocks in agents are load-bearing schema documentation, not verbosity; (4) Standard 1 code blocks in agents are instructions/examples not inline implementations; (5) Standard 6 unconditional scan confirmed — no Chinese characters in agents/*.md or .claude/commands/*.md.

audit_notes: Standard 3: ba.md:1267 uses 'source ... venv/bin/activate && python3 ...' — venv activated before python3. Compliant.

Standard 2: report-schema.json $id field uses 'https://claude.ai/.claude/skills/ui-shared/report-schema.json' — this is a JSON Schema identity URI per RFC, not an operational URL. Not a hardcoded runtime value. Compliant.
Standard 6: Unconditional scan ran against agents/*.md and .claude/commands/*.md and .claude/agents/*.md. No Chinese characters found.

Standard 10: ui-specialist.md references ~/.claude/skills/ui-shared/report-schema.json (exists at skills/ui-shared/report-schema.json) and ~/.claude/scripts/spec-check.py (confirmed at /dev/shm/dev-workspace/dot-claude/scripts/spec-check.py). All skill references (ui-state-matrix, ui-anti-pattern-catalog, etc.) are skill-tool references, not script paths. Compliant.
Standard 8: All 5 agent files contain large JSON output-format blocks. These are load-bearing schema documentation that agents follow to produce their required output. Not verbosity per Standard 8.
